name: blender-like-3d-modeler
description: Prompt-and-photo guided 3D model generation workflow scaffold for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Turns prompts and photos into 3D model job plans.
interface.longDescription: Scaffolds a prompt-and-photo 3D modeling workflow for Codex, including a generation skill, backend integration notes, and a starter job-spec script.
defaultPrompt: Create a stylized chair from these reference photos.
Turn this sneaker photo into a textured GLB model.
Draft a 3D job spec for a game-ready sci-fi helmet.
